title: CCRG shared minimal-pair row schema (logical view)
description: One row per TEXT. Content-flip minimal pairs are reconstructable via pair_id/partner_id. Surface-flip fields are reserved (always false/null here; sibling ParaDetox/LLM artifacts populate them). In the emitted exp_sel_data_out file every field below except input/output is carried under a 'metadata_' prefix (e.g. metadata_family).

input.description: Raw text (movie review / restaurant review / biography).

output.description: Canonical concept label a classifier predicts for this text.

sub_context.description: Independent sub-context labels fixed BEFORE any grouping. {} allowed.

pair_id.description: Links the two members of a content-flip minimal pair; null if unpaired.

is_surface_pair.description: FALSE for all rows in this artifact.
